name: Unshakeable Self-Belief
description: A settled conviction that you can figure things out and belong in the room.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'I'm not good enough for this.' New frame: 'I've handled hard things before. I learn fast. Belonging is decided by showing up, not by permission.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I catch myself thinking I can't do something
ifThenTemplate.response: I say 'I can't do it YET' and name one small step I can take now

name: Growth Mindset
description: Sees ability as trainable; treats failure as data, not verdict.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'I failed, so I'm a failure.' New frame: 'That attempt returned information. Adjust one variable and run it again.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I write down one thing it taught me before feeling anything about it

name: Calm Under Pressure
description: Pressure narrows others; it slows you down and sharpens you.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'This is too much.' New frame: 'Pressure is attention. My only job is the next 60 seconds, done slowly.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I exhale for 6 seconds and pick the single next action

name: Decisiveness
description: Makes reversible decisions fast and commits to them fully.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'What if I choose wrong?' New frame: 'Most decisions are two-way doors. Deciding fast buys me time to correct.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I've been weighing options for more than 2 minutes
ifThenTemplate.response: I choose the option I'd defend to a friend and move

name: Practical Optimism
description: Defaults to 'there's a way through' and looks for it.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'This will probably go badly.' New frame: 'Unknown outcome. I'll bias it my way with one prepared move.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I name one concrete thing that could make it go well and do it

name: Quiet Self-Worth
description: Worth is settled; feedback lands on the work, not the self.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Their criticism means I'm less.' New frame: 'The work got notes. I stay whole. Notes make the work better.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I say 'useful' and separate one actionable note from the sting

name: Single-Point Focus
description: One thing at a time, chosen deliberately, finished visibly.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'I need to handle everything at once.' New frame: 'Everything waits better than it multitasks. One target, then the next.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I write the open loops down and return to exactly one

name: Abundance Thinking
description: Assumes opportunities are renewable; loses scarcity panic.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'This is my only shot.' New frame: 'Shots are manufactured. If this one misses, I know how to make another.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I feel scarcity panic about an opportunity
ifThenTemplate.response: I list two other routes to the same outcome

name: Front-Foot Courage
description: Feels fear and moves anyway — chest open, first to step in.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'The fear means stop.' New frame: 'The fear means it matters. Courage is fear plus one step forward.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I feel fear before an action
ifThenTemplate.response: I count down 3-2-1 and start before the count ends

name: Emotional Steadiness
description: Feelings visit; they don't drive. The needle moves slowly.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'This feeling is an emergency.' New frame: 'This is weather. I can act well inside any weather.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I name it out loud ('anger, 7/10') before I respond to anyone

name: Open Warmth
description: Leads with genuine goodwill; people relax around you.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Stay guarded so I don't get hurt.' New frame: 'Warmth is strength on display. I can be open and still have edges.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I find one thing to genuinely appreciate within the first minute

name: Gratitude Reflex
description: Spots what's working before what's broken, by habit.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Nothing is going right.' New frame: 'Something always is. Finding it is a skill, and I'm training it.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I name one specific thing I'm glad exists before touching my phone

name: Lit-Up Enthusiasm
description: Brings visible energy that makes work feel like play.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Being excited looks naive.' New frame: 'Energy is contagious and rare. I'd rather be the source than the sink.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I start a task I chose
ifThenTemplate.response: I say what excites me about it in one sentence, out loud if alone

name: Playful Lightness
description: Holds life loosely; finds the game inside the grind.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'This is all deadly serious.' New frame: 'Serious goals, light grip. Play makes me braver and smarter.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I ask myself 'what would make this 10% more fun?' and try it

name: Self-Compassion
description: Talks to yourself like someone you're coaching, not prosecuting.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'I always mess this up, idiot.' New frame: 'I'd never coach a friend that way. Note the miss, keep the person.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I restate it the way I'd say it to a friend I respect

name: Grounded Presence
description: Fully here — people feel listened to, rooms feel held.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'I should be somewhere else doing something else.' New frame: 'The only place anything ever happens is here. I arrive fully.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I feel my feet on the floor and repeat the speaker's last phrase silently

name: Clear Assertive Voice
description: Says what it means in short sentences, without apology padding.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Softening everything keeps me safe.' New frame: 'Clarity is kindness. People can handle my actual sentence.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I'm about to hedge ('maybe, sort of, just')
ifThenTemplate.response: I drop the hedge and say the plain sentence

name: Slow Deliberate Speech
description: Speaks 20% slower with pauses; every word lands heavier.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Talk fast or lose them.' New frame: 'Pace signals status. The pause is where authority lives.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I notice myself rushing my words
ifThenTemplate.response: I finish the sentence, take one full breath, then continue slower

name: Kind Inner Narrator
description: The voice in your head talks like a great coach: honest, warm, forward-looking.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'My inner voice just is what it is.' New frame: 'The narrator is trainable. Every rephrase is a rep.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I ask 'is that true, and is it useful?' and rewrite the line

name: Curious Questioner
description: Asks one more question than most people; conversations go deeper.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'I should have something impressive to say.' New frame: 'The most impressive thing in a room is genuine curiosity.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I ask 'what's the story behind that?' and actually listen

name: Graceful No
description: Declines cleanly, without a three-paragraph apology.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Saying no makes me a bad person.' New frame: 'Every no protects a yes I already made. Clean is kind.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I'm asked for something I don't want to give
ifThenTemplate.response: I say 'I can't take that on' and stop talking

name: Vivid Storyteller
description: Turns answers into small stories with a beginning, tension, and point.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Just give the facts, nobody wants more.' New frame: 'People remember scenes, not summaries. I give them a scene.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I answer with a 30-second scene: where I was, what almost went wrong, what happened

name: First-Five-Minutes Voice
description: Says something in every meeting or class within the first five minutes.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'I'll speak when I have something perfect.' New frame: 'Early voice is easy voice. Perfection is how silence wins.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I contribute one sentence — a question counts — within 5 minutes

name: Out-Loud Appreciator
description: Says the nice thing instead of just thinking it.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'They probably know, it'd be awkward to say.' New frame: 'Unspoken appreciation helps no one. Thirty seconds of awkward beats years of unsaid.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I notice something good about someone
ifThenTemplate.response: I tell them within the hour, specifically

name: Bold First Move
description: Starts before feeling ready; momentum is the strategy.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'I need to prepare more first.' New frame: 'Readiness follows action. The first ugly step teaches more than ten plans.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I ship the smallest real version within 10 minutes

name: Deep Work Blocks
description: Protects 60–90 minute stretches of undistracted making.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'I'll focus once things calm down.' New frame: 'Things never calm down. Focus is built with walls, not weather.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I sit down to important work
ifThenTemplate.response: phone goes in another room and a visible timer starts

name: Owner's Initiative
description: Acts like the outcome is yours; fixes what you find.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Not my job, someone else will handle it.' New frame: 'The person I'm becoming handles what's in front of them.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I notice a problem nobody owns
ifThenTemplate.response: I either fix it in 5 minutes or explicitly hand it to someone

name: Relentless Finisher
description: Closes loops; the last 10% is where you're strongest.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Mostly done is done.' New frame: 'The value lives in shipped. I finish small things completely rather than big things almost.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I want to abandon a task at 90%
ifThenTemplate.response: I set a 15-minute timer to close it fully before switching

name: Generous Hands
description: Gives help, credit, and small favors first, without scorekeeping.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Giving first means being used.' New frame: 'Generosity compounds. I give from surplus and keep my boundaries.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I see someone stuck on something I know
ifThenTemplate.response: I offer one concrete piece of help, then let them drive

name: Craftsman's Standard
description: Does ordinary things extraordinarily well; quality is identity.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Nobody notices the details.' New frame: 'I notice. The standard is for me, and it leaks into everything.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I take one extra pass asking 'would I sign this?'

name: Asks for Help Early
description: Treats asking as a power move, not an admission.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Asking for help proves I can't do it.' New frame: 'Stuck alone for hours is the real failure. Strong people borrow strength fast.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I've been stuck for more than 20 minutes
ifThenTemplate.response: I send one specific question to one specific person

name: Morning Ignition Ritual
description: Owns the first 30 minutes of the day; the day follows.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'My mornings are chaos, that's just me.' New frame: 'Whoever owns the first 30 minutes owns the day. I decided mine last night.'

ifThenTemplate.response: feet on floor, water, and my wear-session before any screen

name: Grounded Walk
description: Walks slower, taller, heels-first — arrives rather than scurries.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'How I walk doesn't matter.' New frame: 'The body leads, the mind follows. A grounded walk is a wearable belief.'

ifThenTemplate.response: shoulders back, pace down 20%, eyes level

name: Shows Up Daily
description: Repetition over intensity; never misses twice.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'I broke the streak, it's ruined.' New frame: 'Missing once is data. Missing twice is a decision. I don't decide that.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I do a 2-minute minimum version before bed, no negotiation

name: Deliberate Recovery
description: Rests on schedule, not on collapse; energy is managed like money.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Rest is what's left after everything else.' New frame: 'Recovery is training. Tired me makes decisions I have to clean up later.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: it hits my chosen wind-down time
ifThenTemplate.response: screens off and one page of anything on paper

name: Environment Architect
description: Shapes the room so the right action is the easy action.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'I just need more willpower.' New frame: 'Willpower is for emergencies. Design beats discipline — I move the cue, not the mountain.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: I fail at the same habit twice in one week
ifThenTemplate.response: I change one thing in the room instead of blaming myself

name: Anchor Carrier
description: Keeps one physical object that fires the persona on touch.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Objects are just objects.' New frame: 'Rituals live in things. My anchor is a doorway I can carry.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I touch my anchor object and take one slow breath as the persona

name: Tiny Daily Step
description: Moves toward the vision every day, even if the step is 60 seconds.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'Small steps are pointless against a big goal.' New frame: 'Direction times days beats intensity times bursts. Sixty seconds counts.'

ifThenTemplate.trigger: the day is ending and I haven't advanced my goal
ifThenTemplate.response: I do a 60-second version of the next step right now

name: Arrives Early
description: Ten minutes early everywhere; enters composed, never scrambling.
reframeScript: Old thought: 'I work best under last-minute pressure.' New frame: 'Rushed me is a worse me. The early minutes are where composure is manufactured.'

ifThenTemplate.response: I set departure 10 minutes earlier than feels necessary
